seoTitle: Rugby vs Run-o-Waters — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rugby and Run-o-Waters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rugby and Run-o-Waters.
heading: Rugby vs Run-o-Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rugby, New South Wales and Run-o-Waters, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rugby has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Run-o-Waters (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rugby or Run-o-Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rugby has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Run-o-Waters scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rugby scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Run-o-Waters scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rugby or Run-o-Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rugby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
